title: Candidate
description: A job candidate with personal details, resume information, and application data retrieved from Indeed.

id.description: A unique candidate identifier. For Indeed Apply applications, this corresponds to the apply_id, a unique 64-character identifier linking the employer, candidate, and job posting.

location.description: The candidate's location as a freeform string.

coverLetter.description: The candidate's cover letter text, if provided.

applicationStatus.description: The current status of the candidate's application. Must map to one of Indeed's predefined disposition categories.

screenerQuestionResponses.description: Responses to screener questions configured on the job posting.

appliedAt.description: The timestamp when the candidate submitted the application.

source.description: The source of the application, such as Indeed Apply, organic application, or other channels.

jobPostingId.description: The identifier of the job posting the candidate applied to.
